title: Sqeeze's Better Cake
description: It just makes the cake so much better
body:
# 📦 What does your project add?

**Sqeeze’s Better Cake** completely revamps the vanilla cake model and texture, making it more detailed, smoother, and visually modern while fully preserving the classic Minecraft feel.

# ✨ Features

- Fully redesigned cake model — improved shape, smoother edges, and higher visual clarity
- Updated eating stages — each stage has cleaner, more readable textures
- Vanilla-friendly style — blends naturally into survival builds and decorative areas
- 16x resolution — stays FPS-friendly even on low-end PCs
- Works without mods — just a resource pack

# 🎯 Why would someone want to download it?

Players who enjoy the vanilla look but want slightly more polished, aesthetic visuals will appreciate this pack.
The improved cake looks better in kitchens, picnics, cozy interiors, and decorative builds, making screenshots and builds more appealing without breaking Minecraft’s original style.
